settings.heading:
Our Boutique
Retail Partners
settings.subtext: These stores chose us because they believe in what we're building — and that means everything to us.

settings.name: Vicente Foods
settings.address: 12027 San Vicente Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90049
settings.about: A Brentwood institution since 1948 — independent, family-owned, and known for carrying products worth trusting. The kind of store that chooses carefully. That's why being here matters.

settings.name: Rainbow Acres
settings.address: 13208 W Washington Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90066
settings.about: An OG Westside institution since 1981 — family-owned, health-focused, and trusted by the community long before wellness was a trend. When Rainbow Acres carries you, their customers notice.

settings.heading:
More Locations
Coming Soon.
settings.subheading: We're growing. New doors are opening and new partnerships are in the works. If we're not near you yet — you can help change that.

settings.heading:
Don't See Us
Near You?
Ask.
settings.body:
When multiple customers ask for the same product, stores pay attention. It's one of the most powerful ways a small brand earns new shelf space.

If you want 100CalSnacks at your local grocery store, health food shop, or gym — tell them. And let us know too. When enough people ask, stores listen.
settings.form_sub: Tell us where you want to find us. We'll take it from there.
settings.form_privacy: We'll follow up with you directly and reach out to the store on your behalf.

settings.title: Tell your store
settings.sub: Ask the store manager or buyer to stock 100CalSnacks. Mention the gut-brain health angle — that resonates.

settings.title: Let us know
settings.sub: Fill out the form — we'll follow up with the store directly so your ask has real weight behind it.

settings.title: We do the rest
settings.sub: We'll reach out to the buyer, send samples if needed, and work to get on those shelves.

settings.heading:
Not Near
a Store
Yet?
settings.subheading: Order direct and get it to your door. We're working on getting closer to you.
